mapper.sql: select fm.id, fm.platform_id, fm.standard_field, fm.platform_field, fm.field_type, fm.is_required, fm.sort_order, fm.status, fm.remark, fm.entry_path, fm.create_time, fm.update_time, p.platform_name from yy_field_mapping fm left join yy_platform p on fm.platform_id = p.p_id
mapper.select: select standard_field, platform_field from yy_field_mapping where platform_id = #{platformId} and status = 1
select entry_path from yy_field_mapping where platform_id = #{platformId} and status = 1 and entry_path is not null and entry_path != '' limit 1
mapper.insert:
insert into yy_field_mapping
platform_id, standard_field, platform_field, field_type, is_required, sort_order, status, remark, entry_path,
#{platformId}, #{standardField}, #{platformField}, #{fieldType}, #{isRequired}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{entryPath},
mapper.delete:
delete from yy_field_mapping where id in
#{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into yy_field_mapping (platform_id, standard_field, platform_field, field_type, is_required, sort_order, status, remark, entry_path) values
(#{item.platformId}, #{item.standardField}, #{item.platformField}, #{item.fieldType}, #{item.isRequired}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.entryPath})
on duplicate key update platform_field = values(platform_field), field_type = values(field_type), is_required = values(is_required), sort_order = values(sort_order), status = values(status), remark = values(remark), entry_path = values(entry_path)
